LAW AND MOTION 302, A DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 11, 2016. THEREFORE, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A dismissal of entire action of all parties and all causes of action was filed on January 11, 2016. Therefore, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND COMPLAINT is off calendar.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
